case_title: DOMINIC XAVIER PEREZ VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST DOMINIC XAVIER PEREZ FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-14-2016, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-01-2016. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-13-2016 CONTINUED TO DEC-13-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. THE SEP-13-2016 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-13-2017 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-13-2017 AT 10:30 AM., PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608 (B). THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

Off Calendar Jun-13-2017 Dismissal
